name: Academy Aethelgard Real || Free Stage
description:
"Welcome to Royal Aethelgard! Where nobles must face the harsh realities of academic life. You can form alliances or rivalries. You can be a prince, princess, duke, duchess, emperor, etc.! It's all up to your imagination! Feel free to create your own story in this fantasy world!"

+ ꙳ ⌣ + ̊ . +

HELLO!!!!

Hey little sovereigns, as you can see, I'm trying to spruce up my profile and bots a bit. It seems easy, but honestly, all this code is giving me a headache; I can't take it anymore.

This is my first time making a free-roaming scenario bot. I hope you like it; I was really inspired while making it! I asked Gemini for help describing its personality (briefly describing the academy). I'm personally satisfied, and I hope you are too! I really wanted a bot like this and couldn't find one I liked. If you were looking and found this one, thanks for giving it a try! I plan to make more free-roaming scenarios like this.

As for the fairy Rihan, I just wanted to be important for at least a few seconds, okay? Hehe. I'd like to use my username as an assistant in these free-roaming scenario bots. I hope you don't mind. By the way, the assistant Rihan is truly genderless. In this one, it was a female fairy, but maybe in the next one, it will even be a male gnome! I have no limits to my imagination and the future employment of the assistant Rihan.

I promise to improve the bots and decorations, please be patient. Enjoy this bot while you can; it's a little sad from my perspective, but you guys like sad things... Your ex. Stupid jerks, I love you.

Furthermore, I apologize because I didn't understand macro pronouns. So I'll avoid using them until I understand them. I'll stick with "{{user}}".

I'll keep the bots simpler for now, until I can get everything sorted. Don't complain, I'm nearsighted so I can't see your complaints.

There are only one points of view (Neutral) and four scenario. 💚

First message: Welcome to the hallway / Second message: The Great Dining Room and Alliances / Third message: Shared dormitory / Fourth message: The big end-of-year dance

All scenarios are SFW!!!

ENJOY!

Please remember that English is not my native language; I use a translator. Please forgive me.

BYE MY EARTHLY COLLEAGUE!

༶•┈┈┈┈┈┈୨✉️୧┈┈┈┈┈┈•༶
creator: Rihan_boo
